EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IPath

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that identify a path and define its behavior.

[Guid("0A82061C-95CB-11D0-82F7-0000F8034032")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IPath : ICurve, IGeometry

Generalize(double)

Generalizes this path using the Douglas-Peucker algorithm.

Smooth(double)

Converts this path into a smooth approximation of itself that contains only Bezier curve segments.

void Smooth(double maxAllowableOffset)

Parameters

maxAllowableOffset double

Examples

Sample Snippet

SmoothLocal(int)

Replaces up to four segments (two on each of the specified vertex index) with bezier curves.

void SmoothLocal(int vertexIndex)

Parameters

vertexIndex int
